sentences.arabic: أَحَبَّ يُوسُفُ الرَّسْمَ مُنْذُ أَنْ كَانَ طِفْلًا صَغِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Jusuf je volio crtanje otkako je bio malo dijete.
sentences.translationEn: Yusuf loved drawing since he was a small child.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَرْسُمُ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ يَجِدُهُ فِي الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Crtao je na svemu što bi pronašao u kući.
sentences.translationEn: He used to draw on everything he found in the house.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَى لَهُ أَبُوهُ أَلْوَانًا وَدَفَاتِرَ رَسْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Otac mu je kupio boje i bilježnice za crtanje.
sentences.translationEn: His father bought him colors and drawing notebooks.

sentences.arabic: رَسَمَ يُوسُفُ مَنْزِلَهُ وَعَائِلَتَهُ وَحَدِيقَتَهُ بِأَلْوَانٍ جَمِيلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Jusuf je nacrtao svoju kuću, porodicu i vrt lijepim bojama.
sentences.translationEn: Yusuf drew his house, his family, and his garden in beautiful colors.
